{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Akura uniform
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] wears an [[Akura uniform]] with a bright violet script on the hem.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura]] team uniform has a high collar and a cape.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
